subject: [PATCH v2 3/5] x86/virt/tdx: Add SEAMCALL wrapper for TDH.SYS.DISABLE

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the SEAMCALL wrapper's behavior, specifically whether it should lock out other SEAMCALLs and how this is documented in the spec.

reviews.author: Edgecombe, Rick P
reviews.summary: Clarified that the TDX module contract is still in draft form and suggested tweaking its behavior to match kernel needs.

2026-03-30.patch_summary: The patch adds a SEAMCALL wrapper for TDH.SYS.DISABLE, but the implementation is incomplete and relies on an unimplemented TDX module contract.
